package.name: drona_description
package.description: URDF description of the D.R.O.N.A. simulated humanoid (head + torso + 6-DOF advising arm). Joint names match drona.interaction.demonstration.JOINT_NAMES (j0_base_yaw .. j5_gripper) so the gesture/policy nodes' /drona/joint_states drive the model directly in RViz, Gazebo, and Isaac Sim.
